nodes.label: Flat lacuna.* Plugin Layout
nodes.rationale: Top-level lacuna.* directories are required for Omarchy plugin source installs.

nodes.label: Omarchy-native Service Preference
nodes.rationale: Lacuna should defer rich system surfaces to Omarchy and reserve custom widgets for durable non-native workflows.

nodes.label: Shell vs Bar Injection Rule
nodes.rationale: Menu/panel plugins get shell, while simple bar widgets use bar, moduleName, settings, and Quickshell services.

nodes.label: Lacuna gap metaphor
nodes.rationale: Absence, recession, and half-hidden meaning are the design material.
